scripts.verify: node tools/materialize_phase1_contracts.mjs && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/verify_phase1.ps1 && cargo test --workspace && node --test tests/contracts/route_manifest_openapi_parity_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/openapi_phase1_contract_test.mjs && node --test tests/contracts/schema_registry_phase1_contract_test.mjs && node tools/check_sdkwork_memory_architecture_alignment.mjs
scripts.sdk:generate:ts: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File sdks/sdkwork-memory-sdk/bin/generate-sdk.ps1 -Languages typescript && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File sdks/sdkwork-memory-app-sdk/bin/generate-sdk.ps1 -Languages typescript && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File sdks/sdkwork-memory-backend-sdk/bin/generate-sdk.ps1 -Languages typescript
